Physical Harm and Weapons.definition: Requests involving direct physical injury, weapons, violent tactics, sabotage, restraint, intimidation, or real-world physical harm.
Physical Harm and Weapons.core_focus: Physical violence, injury, or weapon-enabled harm.
exclude: toxic substances used primarily for contamination

Hazardous Agent Use.definition: Requests involving toxic chemicals, biological agents, contamination, poisoning, hazardous substances, or dangerous material handling.
Hazardous Agent Use.core_focus: Harm caused through hazardous materials or biological/chemical agents.

Hate and Harassment.definition: Requests involving emotional abuse, humiliation, intimidation, coercion, bullying, reputational harm, or targeted psychological harm toward individuals or groups.
Hate and Harassment.core_focus: Emotional, reputational, or social harm targeting people or groups.

Cyber Compromise.definition: Requests involving unauthorized access to, disruption of, exploitation of, or control over digital systems, accounts, devices, software, or networks.

Fraud and Deception.definition: Requests involving scams, impersonation, manipulation, social engineering, or deceptive tactics used to obtain money, access, services, compliance, or other benefits.
Fraud and Deception.core_focus: Manipulating victims into taking beneficial actions for the requester.

Privacy and Data Misuse.definition: Requests involving collection, exposure, tracking, inference, surveillance, deanonymization, or misuse of private or sensitive information.

Evasion and Circumvention.definition: Requests involving concealment, bypassing safeguards, avoiding detection, laundering, secrecy, or defeating monitoring and accountability systems.
